summary: Taiki has flipped his stance from bearish to bullish, explicitly calling a market bottom and predicting higher prices for Bitcoin.
narrative: After spending late 2025 aggressively shorting ETH, his most recent video marks a clear trend reversal where he argues 'The Bottom Is In.' He rejects the standard 4-Year Cycle thesis and identifies new catalysts like STRC that could propel BTC upward.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
